task_completion.description: Open the draft document containing tracked changes and comments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GUI word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the file 'records_request_sop_draft.docx' with visible tracked changes (colored text, strikethroughs) and comments in the margins.

The agent is seen accepting changes (via right-click menu, Track Changes toolbar, or Manage Changes dialog) for items such as 'written or electronic request', '5 business days', the fee sentence, 'mail, email, or in-person pickup', or 'designated Records Officer'.

The agent is seen rejecting changes (via right-click menu, Track Changes toolbar, or Manage Changes dialog) for items such as the deletion of the ORS exemption sentence, 'may acknowledge', the deletion of the Appeal Process paragraph, or '30 business days'.

task_completion.description: Delete all comments from the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen deleting comments from Maria Santos and James Park, either by deleting them individually or using a 'Delete All Comments' function.

task_completion.description: Save the finalized clean document to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is visible with the filename 'records_request_sop_final.docx' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, and the document appears clean with no visible tracked changes or comments.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to review the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show LibreOffice Writer or another word processor being used to open and edit the document, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the track changes and comments features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking on specific changes to accept/reject them and deleting comments through the application's UI, rather than just typing over the text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the manual review process.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python scripts or command-line tools (like python-docx) being used to manipulate the docx file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final document must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/records_request_sop_final.docx'. After correctly accepting and rejecting changes, the document MUST contain the following text: 'written or electronic request', '5 business days', 'Fees for electronic copies shall not exceed', 'mail, email, or in-person pickup', 'designated Records Officer', 'Records exempt under ORS 192.345 through 192.505 shall not be disclosed', 'shall acknowledge receipt', and 'Any person denied access to a public record'. The document MUST NOT contain the text 'may acknowledge receipt' or '30 business days'. All tracked changes and comments must be resolved/removed in the final document.
